plugins.name: arch-wiki
plugins.description: Deterministic, tool-first architecture-wiki contract: CLI + hooks for next-id, scaffold, lint, validate-graph, sync-templates, guard-path, migrate/adopt (schema v2). Agnostic ProjectConfig + a design process flow (hypothesis → questionnaire → ingest → render-issue → trace) with a traceability ledger and books-rag enrichment. Egress to Jira/GitLab (human-gated /arch-wiki:issue — self-contained body with the Confluence-mirror link inlined at each artifact's first mention) and a safe, full 1:1 Confluence KB mirror (/arch-wiki:publish: numeric spaceId + cloudId, deterministic destination-drift guard, bidirectional issue↔page trace, create/update/delete reconciled, visibility filter, cross-links, optional RU translation projection incl. titles, C4-diagram placeholders). Ingest the Product Owner's Confluence User Story Log (/arch-wiki:pull-stories → raw/_synced), and check C4 model ⟷ wiki consistency (/arch-wiki:validate-c4) with Foam + LikeC4 MCP as read-only navigation aids. JSON-envelope output, non-destructive adoption.
